headline: The Celsius Stock Selloff  Shows How Costco Can Impact Any Business
summary: Celsius Holdings  stock is under pressure this week as Wall Street weighs whether  Costco Wholesale  decision to launch an inexpensive energy drink could negatively impact demand for Celsius products.  Heading into Thursday, Celsius stock was down in four straight sessions, losing about 16% over that period.  The steep decline comes amid Costco releasing a line of energy drinks under its private label Kirkland Signature—with similar flavors and packaging that bears a striking resemblance to Celsius products, but at a 55% discount.

headline: The S&P 500's Thanksgiving Leftover Stocks In March 2026
summary: The Thanksgiving Leftover Stocks are a group of ten stocks that Seeking Alpha's Jason Capul identified as "Thanksgiving leftovers no one wants".

headline: Lululemon (LULU) Price Target Cut Amid Leadership Concerns
summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) ranks among the most profitable Canadian Stocks to buy now. On March 18, Truist Securities reduced its price target for Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ:LULU) shares to $170 from $200, keeping a Hold rating. The firm highlighted persistent uncertainty over the company’s CEO search as the main driver for the price target […]
